channel.title: General on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in General on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Demoscene: Where Art Met Assembly
item.description: The story of the demoscene: where programmers turned constraint into creativity, and assembly language into art.

item.title: Favourite Museums
item.description: Personal list of favourite museums, particularly focused on computing and technology history.

item.title: Favourite Computers, Consoles & Mobiles
item.description: Personal history and collection of favourite computers, gaming consoles, and mobile devices from the 1970s to present day.

item.title: Classic TV Shows
item.description: Collection of classic British television shows and comedy programs including Tomorrow's World, Fawlty Towers, Blackadder, and more.

item.title: The Hindley Street Country Club
item.description: Australian cover band group with millions of YouTube views and global following for innovative music arrangements.

item.title: Very very large numbers
item.description: Collection of fascinating YouTube videos exploring extraordinarily large numbers, infinity, and mathematical concepts.

item.title: Apple finally allows game emulators in the App Store
item.description: News and resources about Apple's decision to allow game emulators in the App Store, including Delta, Dolphin, and retro emulator apps.

item.title: Worst User Interfaces
item.description:
Sunday read.

This is hilarious. Engineers are competing who creates the worst UI on Reddit.

I think the winners are:

1/ Enter your phone number pic.twitter.com/944duji1Im

— Aleksandr Volodarsky (@volodarik) May 14, 2023

item.title: General Links
item.description: Curated collection of technology, podcast, and personal blog links covering tech, science, and cultural topics.

item.title: China syncs monkey brain with a computer
item.description: News about Chinese researchers successfully conducting a brain-computer interface experiment with a monkey.

item.title: Favourite Computer Games
item.description: Personal collection of favourite computer and console games across decades of gaming history.

item.title: Hugo Shortcode Syntax
item.description: Developer reference guide for Hugo shortcodes and embedded content syntax.

item.title: Markdown Syntax
item.description: Developer reference guide for Markdown syntax and Hugo shortcodes used on this site.
